## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (would require migration)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] 🧪 Test improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style guide (ESLint + Prettier pass)
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run test` passes (added tests for new behavior)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing change
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if new feature requires setup
- [ ] i18n keys added for any new user-facing strings (es/en/pt)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files committed
- [ ] SQL migrations are additive (no destructive changes)
